prompt: Quiero que me hagas el grill. Voy a reemplazar nuestro sistema de auth actual (sesiones con cookies) por JWT + refresh tokens. Somos una app FastAPI con ~10k usuarios activos.

assertions.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
Response includes an Assumption Map table before the first question
First question follows the template with a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
